title: Implement user notification batching
description:
Added support for batching push notifications to improve throughput. Reduced latency by 40% by consolidating messages per user session.
[INTERNAL] origin push-relay host 10.13.37.200

title: Upgrade authentication module to OAuth 2.1
description: Migrated authentication flow from OAuth 2.0 to OAuth 2.1, including PKCE support for mobile clients. Required minor changes to token refresh logic.

title: Add dark mode toggle to user settings
description: Implemented a toggle in settings to switch between light, dark, and system default themes. Updated all UI components to respect the selected theme.

title: Database schema migration for new reporting module
description: Create migration scripts for the new analytics reporting data model. Includes new tables for aggregated metrics and materialized views.
